events.event_description: U.S. Legation established in Latvia when the first Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary, Frederick William Backus Coleman, presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Frederick William Backus Coleman, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1922-09-20. Credentials presented: 1922-11-13. Left post on 1931-10-20.

events.event_description: U.S. Embassy (Legation) in Riga closed following Soviet occupation of Latvia.

evidence.quote:
Soviet forces occupied Riga on June 17, 1940.

Earl Lenoir Packer, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Embassy Riga closed 1940-09-05.

events.event_description: U.S. Embassy re-established in Latvia after resumption of diplomatic relations on September 2, 1991; Chargé d'Affaires ad interim Ints M Silins presented credentials on October 2, 1991.

evidence.quote:
The United States resumed diplomatic relations with Latvia on September 2, 1991.

Ints M Silins, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1991-10-02.
